fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) ticket-viewer imports Graph3DView from viewer-api. 2) DependencyGraph component replaces SVG GraphView.tsx. 3) Ticket subgraph data (nodes with state/title, edges with kind) mapped to Graph3DNode/Graph3DEdge. 4) Ticket states mapped to node colors. 5) Edge kinds (depends_on, blocks, linked) visually distinguished. 6) Root ticket highlighted. 7) Click node navigates to ticket. 8) SVG GraphView kept as non-WebGPU fallback or removed. 9) Loading/error/empty states preserved. 10) Responsive rendering at desktop/tablet/mobile widths.
fields.title: Impl: GPU dependency graph in ticket-viewer replacing SVG GraphView
